## Summary
I've updated `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/commands/workspace/create/test_output_modes.py` with the following changes:
1. **Line 140** - CLI argument list: Changed `"--from-plan-file"` to `"--from-pr-file"` in the `test_create_with_json_and_plan_file()` test function
2. **Line 250** - Docstring: Updated comment from `"Test that --stay works with --from-plan-file flag."` to `"Test that --stay works with --from-pr-file flag."` in the `test_create_with_stay_and_plan_file()` function
3. **Line 279** - CLI argument list: Changed `"--from-plan-file"` to `"--from-pr-file"` in the argument array passed to `runner.invoke()`
All three changes specifically target the CLI flag names as requested, without modifying any other code or variable names related to plan functionality.
